Our Heritage

UAE's Most Trusted Automotive Specialists

At Hassan Moustafa Automotive, we are more than a garage — we are your dedicated long-term partner for maintaining the performance, safety, and value of your vehicle. Founded in 2006, we built our reputation on a foundation of engineering integrity, precision diagnostics, and uncompromising parts authenticity.

Our workshop handles every marque with equal attention — whether you drive a daily family saloon or a rare collector's supercar. From computerised ECU scans and cylinder head overhauls to full transmission rebuilds and genuine OEM parts sourcing, every job is done right, on time, and at a fair price.

20+
Years Legacy
10k+
Cars Serviced
50+
Brands Covered
Our Full Story arrow_forward
The Hassan Moustafa Advantage

Why Clients Choose Us

Everything we do is built around your trust — from the moment you call to the moment your car is returned.

verified_user

100% Genuine Parts

We maintain an absolute zero-tolerance policy on counterfeit components. Every part installed carries full manufacturer authentication and a serialised guarantee.

groups

Expert Engineers

Our certified technicians carry years of hands-on experience across German, Japanese, and British platforms — delivering diagnostic precision that rivals OEM dealerships.

schedule

On-Time Delivery

We respect your schedule absolutely. Our workshop operates on structured job timelines with proactive SMS updates throughout your vehicle's service progression.

receipt_long

Transparent Pricing

No hidden charges. No surprise invoices. Every quotation itemises labour, parts, and VAT before a single bolt is touched — you always know exactly what you are paying for.

local_shipping

Pickup & Delivery

We collect your vehicle from your home or office and return it at your convenience anywhere across Dubai — no drop-off hassle, no disruption to your day.

support_agent

Emergency Assistance

Breakdowns don't keep business hours. Our emergency response service operates extended hours for urgent roadside support, diagnostics, and rapid recovery across the UAE.

workspace_premium

Certified Workshop

Our facility is equipped with manufacturer-grade diagnostic tooling, lift systems, and climate-controlled bays — an environment engineered for precise, high-quality workmanship.

thumb_up

Trusted Since 2006

Nearly two decades of consistent service, a loyal client base across the UAE, and thousands of successful vehicle restorations — our track record speaks for itself.

Workshop Capabilities

Comprehensive Service Offering

From routine maintenance to complex engine rebuilds — our certified technicians cover every mechanical and electrical discipline.

build

Engine Reconstruction & Overhaul

Complete disassembly, precision measurement, and rebuild using OEM-grade components. Cylinder head work, crank regrinding, gasket replacement, timing chain systems.

settings

Transmission & Gearbox Repair

Automatic, manual, and CVT gearbox overhaul. Clutch replacement, torque converter service, gear programming, and post-repair road-test verification.

ac_unit

AC Climate Repair & Recharge

Full AC system diagnostics, compressor overhaul, evaporator and condenser cleaning, refrigerant recharge, and cabin filter replacement.

car_crash

Body Painting & Dent Repair

Precision colour-matching, minor dent PDR, full panel resprays, and stone chip touch-ups. All finishes protected with professional clear-coat lacquer.

memory

ECU Diagnostics & Sensors

Multi-system scan, fault code read and clear, sensor calibration, ADAS module reset, battery registration, and electronic module coding.

handyman

Regular Scheduled Service

Manufacturer-schedule oil and filter service, brake inspection, fluid top-ups, tyre rotation, and comprehensive 50-point vehicle health check.

View All Services
